professionalSummary: With a background in building and managing e-commerce platforms, I pivoted to software development to solve complex problems with code. As a recent Computer Programming graduate (3.6 GPA) with a strong foundation in JavaScript, React, C++, and Python, I apply my business acumen and technical skills to build robust and scalable software.

workExperience.title: Web Developer
responsibilities: Developed a production-ready marketplace using Next.js 15, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, converting a Hackathon concept into a scalable web application.
Implemented a comprehensive error handling system with custom reusable components, improving user experience by providing context-aware feedback for all HTTP status codes.

workExperience.title: Ecommerce Specialist
responsibilities: Redesigned website entirely on the Shopify platform, implementing a modern UI and custom JavaScript features that contributed to a 35% increase in online sales.
Drove a 40% increase in organic traffic within six months by executing a targeted SEO strategy, focusing on keyword optimization for product descriptions and creating high-ranking landing pages.

projects.name: Agri-Tourism Marketplace
description: Developed the initial prototype for an agritourism platform during an 8-hour hackathon, focusing on core user flows for browsing and viewing tour details.
Built a mock back-end using Node.js and Express to serve JSON data from local files, simulating a live API for the front-end to consume.
Configured the project for serverless deployment using a vercel.json file, demonstrating an early understanding of modern front-end hosting and API routing.

projects.name: Restaurant Order Management System
description: Developed a console-based restaurant management application in C++, applying object-oriented principles like inheritance and polymorphism to model menu items and handle billing.
Implemented a dynamic menu system capable of parsing and loading food and drink items from external .csv files, allowing for easy updates without recompiling.
Ensured data persistence for itemized receipts by utilizing file I/O operations, allowing completed bills to be saved and reviewed in subsequent sessions.
